endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/locations/{location}/reclaimStorageCapacity
endpoints.description: Start reclaim storage capacity on deleted storage objects.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/locations/{location}/storageaccounts
endpoints.description: Returns a list of storage accounts.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/locations/{location}/storageaccounts/{accountId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/locations/{location}/storageaccounts/{accountId}/undelete
endpoints.description: Undelete a deleted storage account with new account name if the a new name is provided.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.
